revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{Commons category|2012 in aviation}} {{Year by category | m = 2 | c = 0 | d = 1 | y = 2 | cat = 航空 | sortkey = こうくう }} Category:各年の航空...'
revision.text:
{{Commons category|2012 in aviation}} {{Year by category | m = 2 | c = 0 | d = 1 | y = 2 | cat = 航空 | sortkey = こうくう }}
[[Category:各年の航空]] [[Category:2012年の交通|こうくう]]
{{Commons category|2012 in aviation}} {{Year by category | m = 2 | c = 0 | d = 1 | y = 2 | cat = 航空 | sortkey = こうくう | parent = 各年の航空 | subcat = 2012年の交通 }}

revision.comment: Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:2012年の航空]] [[ar:Category:الطيران في 2012]] [[commons:Category:2012 in aviation]] [[fa:Category:هوانوردی در ۲۰۱۲ (میلادی)]] [[fi:Category:Vuoden 2012 ilmailu]] [[fr:Category:2012 en aéronautique]] [[hu:Category:2012 a légi közlekedésben]] [[ko:Category:2012년 항공]] [[pt:Category:2012 na aviação]] [[ru:Category:2012 год в авиации]] [[tr:Category:2012'de havacılık]] [[uk:Category:2012 в авіації]] [[ur:Category:ہوابازی میں 2012ء]] [[vi:Category:Hàng không năm 2012]] [[zh:Category:2012年航空]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Japan Airlines 1402 Flight Attendant Skirt Voyeurism Incident]].

revision.comment: 3 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:Category:2012年の航空 up to rev 62998828

Bot: restore translated version

Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Year by category | m = 2 | c = 0 | d = 1 | y = 2 | cat = 航空 | parent = 各年の航空 | subcat = 2012年の交通 | sortkey = こうくう }} {{Catmore}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:2012年の航空]]|version=62998828}} [[ja:Category:2012年の航空]]
==Old Content== ==Japanese Content== {{Commonscat}} {{Year by category | m = 2 | c = 0 | d = 1 | y = 2 | cat = 航空 | parent = 各年の航空 | subcat = 2012年の交通 | sortkey = こうくう }} {{Catmore}}
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:2012年の航空]]}}
==Old Content== (2025-05-16T01:09:38Z): (Bot: add category Category:Aviation by year)
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Japan Airlines 1402 Flight Attendant Skirt Voyeurism Incident]].
(2025-05-16T01:09:33Z): (Bot: add category Category:2012 in transport)
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Japan Airlines 1402 Flight Attendant Skirt Voyeurism Incident]].
(2025-05-15T07:17:37Z): (Bot: update category metadata)
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Japan Airlines 1402 Flight Attendant Skirt Voyeurism Incident]].
{{translated page|ja|Category:2012年の航空|version=62998828|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: add category" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "==↵ Category:" to "== Category:"
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Bot: add [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q32637126)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q32637126)
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
